ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial data */,
  "Ybac" REAL /* Financial metric Ybac */,
  "Yoprd" REAL /* Financial metric Yoprd */,
  "Ygprd" REAL /* Financial metric Ygprd */,
  "Ycexp" REAL /* Financial metric Ycexp */,
  "Yfexp" REAL /* Financial metric Yfexp */,
  "Ysdtm" REAL /* Financial metric Ysdtm */,
  "Yemp" REAL /* Financial metric Yemp */,
  "Yemphr" REAL /* Financial metric Yemphr */,
  "Ywgs" REAL /* Financial metric Ywgs */,
  "Ydvcst" REAL /* Financial metric Ydvcst */,
  "Ylsexp" REAL /* Financial metric Ylsexp */,
  "Yolk" REAL /* Financial metric Yolk */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of financial data (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Ybac, Yoprd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data type */,
  "collection_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the collection frequency */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_collection_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_frequency_id") REFERENCES collection_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection frequency (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection frequency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, data scientist, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_datasets" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-dataset relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-dataset relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)
